Name: Volumetric Fog
Description: Covers parameters relating to volumetric fog.

Fields.Name: Enable Volumetric Fog
Fields.Description: Enables or disables the volumetric fog system.

Fields.Name: Volume Width
Fields.Description: Defines the horizontal resolution of the volumetric fog grid.

Fields.Name: Volume Depth
Fields.Description: Defines the depth resolution of the volumetric fog volume.

Fields.Name: Game Scale
Fields.Description: Scales the fog simulation relative to world scale.

Fields.Name: Near Depth
Fields.Description: Distance from the camera where volumetric fog begins.

Fields.Name: Far Depth
Fields.Description: Distance where volumetric fog reaches full density or terminates.

Fields.Name: Near Offset
Fields.Description: Offsets the near fog boundary for fine tuning local fog start position.

Fields.Name: Fog End Depth
Fields.Description: Defines the maximum depth at which fog influence fades out.

Fields.Name: Fog Draw Timing
Fields.Description: Controls when volumetric fog is rendered in the pipeline.

Fields.Name: Enable Analytical Fog
Fields.Description: Enables analytical (non-volumetric) fog contribution.

Fields.Name: Volume Slice Sample Offset
Fields.Description: Offsets sampling positions within fog slices to reduce banding artifacts.

Fields.Name: Culling by Scene Depth
Fields.Description: Enables culling of fog based on scene depth buffer information.

Fields.Name: Cancel-In Scattering Rate from SSR
Fields.Description: Reduces fog in-scattering contribution based on screen space reflections.

Fields.Name: Global Fixed Density
Fields.Description: Sets a uniform base density for volumetric fog.

Fields.Name: Global Scattering
Fields.Description: Controls anisotropy of light scattering in fog (forward/back scattering bias).

Fields.Name: Global Local Light Scale
Fields.Description: Scales the contribution of local lights affecting volumetric fog.

Fields.Name: Global Local Light Distance Scale
Fields.Description: Controls attenuation of local light influence over distance in fog.

Fields.Name: Global Height Fog Distribution
Fields.Description: Defines how fog density is distributed vertically.

Fields.Name: Global Height Fog Offset
Fields.Description: Offsets the vertical position of height-based fog distribution.

Fields.Name: Global Height Fog Reference Offset
Fields.Description: Reference offset used for height fog calibration.

Fields.Name: Global Height Fog Reference Mode Rate
Fields.Description: Blending rate for height fog reference mode transitions.

Fields.Name: Global Height Fog Density Scale
Fields.Description: Scales density of height-based fog globally.

Fields.Name: Global Absorption Scale
Fields.Description: Controls how strongly fog absorbs light across RGB channels.

Fields.Name: Sky Light: Sky Color
Fields.Description: Color of sky contribution to volumetric fog lighting.

Fields.Name: Sky Light: Height Attenuation
Fields.Description: Controls how sky lighting attenuates with altitude in fog.

Fields.Name: Sky Light: Start Distance
Fields.Description: Distance at which sky lighting begins affecting fog.

Fields.Name: Directional Light: Light Bank ID
Fields.Description: Identifier for directional light bank used in fog lighting.

Fields.Name: Directional Light: Light ID
Fields.Description: Identifier for the directional light affecting volumetric fog.

Fields.Name: Directional Light: Direct Color
Fields.Description: Color of direct light contribution in fog scattering.

Fields.Name: Directional Light: Opposite Color
Fields.Description: Color contribution from opposite scattering direction.

Fields.Name: VDirectional Light: Height Attenuation
Fields.Description: Attenuation of directional light influence with height.

Fields.Name: Directional Light: Start Distance
Fields.Description: Distance at which directional light starts affecting fog.

Fields.Name: Directional Light: Shadow Sample Count
Fields.Description: Number of shadow samples used for directional light in fog.

Fields.Name: Directional Light: Shadow Dither
Fields.Description: Amount of dithering applied to directional light shadows in fog.

Fields.Name: Directional Light: Angle Clip
Fields.Description: Clips directional light influence based on angular threshold.

Fields.Name: Directional Light: Enable Reprojection
Fields.Description: Enables temporal reprojection for directional light in fog.

Fields.Name: Directional Light: Jitter Count
Fields.Description: Number of jitter samples for directional light scattering.

Fields.Name: Directional Light: Jitter XY Size
Fields.Description: Spatial size of jitter applied to directional light sampling.

Fields.Name: Directional Light: Feedback Weight
Fields.Description: Temporal accumulation weight for directional light fog contribution.

Fields.Name: Fog Volume: Injecting Sample Count
Fields.Description: Number of samples used when injecting local fog volumes.

Fields.Name: Fog Volume: Injecting Dither
Fields.Description: Dithering applied during fog volume injection to reduce banding.

Fields.Name: Fog Volume: Injecting Reprojection Enabled
Fields.Description: Enables temporal reprojection for fog volume injection.

Fields.Name: Fog Volume: Injecting Feedback Weight
Fields.Description: Temporal feedback weight for fog volume injection.

Fields.Name: Sample Count
Fields.Description: Number of volumetric fog raymarching samples per frame.

Fields.Name: Dither
Fields.Description: Amount of dithering applied to volumetric fog sampling.

Fields.Name: Fog Volume: Light Injection Enabled
Fields.Description: Enables injection of lighting data from fog volumes into the global volumetric fog system.

Fields.Name: Fog Volume: Combine Own Drawing with Light Injection
Fields.Description: Determines whether fog volumes blend their own rendering results with injected lighting for a combined visual effect.
